monorepo-overview.summary: igrp-framework-nextjs is a pnpm workspace monorepo that publishes the IGRP Framework — a set of React/Next.js packages used to build IGRP applications at NOSi — plus reference templates. Published artifacts go to the internal NOSi Sonatype registry (https://sonatype.nosi.cv/repository/igrp/).
monorepo-overview.workspace-layout: packages/ design-system/ → @igrp/igrp-framework-react-design-system (client UI library) design-system-storybook/ → Storybook + visual/regression tests for the DS framework/ next-auth/ → @igrp/framework-next-auth (NextAuth wrappers, OIDC, session, middleware) next-types/ → @igrp/framework-next-types (shared TS types; depends on next-auth types) next-ui/ → @igrp/framework-next-ui (client template chrome) next/ → @igrp/framework-next (server entry: IGRPLayout, IGRPRootLayout, igrpBuildConfig, API client) templates/ demo/ → @igrp/framework-next-template-new (workspace:* and published zip) demo-legacy/ → older reference template scripts/ → repo utilities (e.g. migrate-primitive-names.mjs)

notes.note: pnpm build:framework runs in exactly this order.
Do not reorder — next-ui imports from the DS and auth packages, and next imports from next-ui/next-auth/next-types.
framework-next-auth is the root — changes there cascade to every downstream package.
framework-next is the top — changes affect templates/apps but no other framework packages.

group.name: setup

command.purpose: MUST run once after install before dev:demo works

group.note: For fastest dev loop without auth/backend setup: IGRP_PREVIEW_MODE=true in templates/demo/.env bypasses auth, uses mock data, disables session refetch.

command.purpose: full ordered build (always use this after cross-package changes)

group.name: storybook-tests
group.note: More scripts inside packages/design-system-storybook: test-storybook:ci, test-storybook:update-snapshots, test:vitest, chromatic.

group.name: releases
group.note: Each publishable package has a release script that publishes to Sonatype with yarn publish --tag latest. Do not switch registries or tags without checking.

notes.note: SWC+Babel pipeline: build:swc → build:babel (React Compiler pass) → build:types (emit .d.ts).
Escape hatch when the React Compiler misbehaves: build:without_reactcompiler.

rules.rule: Templates compile Tailwind once in the app, not in framework packages.
@source in the app's globals.css must point at both app source and the compiled dist/ of the IGRP packages, so Tailwind generates utilities used inside the DS.
Import tokens only — never the prebuilt styles.css.
Dark mode is the .dark class on a parent (driven by next-themes).
Theme variants (theme-blue, etc.) override tokens in src/styles/themes.css, imported after the tokens import.

incorrect-import.reason: causes cascade conflicts and missing utilities

layer.name: Horizon
layer.when: Default for all app UI. Opinionated — built-in labels, icons, loading, IGRPForm integration.

layer.name: Primitives
layer.when: Custom composition, full control. Thin Radix + CVA wrappers.

three-layer-ui-model.rule: Horizon is always first choice. Drop to Primitives only when Horizon doesn't fit.
Everything from @igrp/igrp-framework-react-design-system is client-side — any file importing from it needs 'use client'.

package.name: @igrp/framework-next
package.role: server-side entry: IGRPRootLayout, IGRPLayout, igrpBuildConfig, access-management API client (igrpGetAccessClient, igrpGetAccessClientConfig).

package.name: @igrp/framework-next-ui
package.role: client-side template chrome: header, sidebar, menus, nav-user, breadcrumbs, command search, theme selector, auth carousel/form, IGRPRootProviders, IGRPSessionProvider.

package.name: @igrp/framework-next-auth
package.role: NextAuth.js wrappers with multiple entry points (./server, ./client, ./session, ./jwt, ./middleware, ./config, ./sanitize, ./oidc, ./providers, ./types).

package.name: @igrp/framework-next-types
package.role: shared TS types; depends on @igrp/framework-next-auth for session/JWT types.

template-flow-demo.step: Validates NextAuth session, bypasses public/login/logout/API routes, honors IGRP_PREVIEW_MODE.
Auth checks, session load, renders IGRPLayout with header/sidebar around the (igrp) route group.
igrpBuildConfig assembles layout + API + toaster + session; swaps in mock data when IGRP_PREVIEW_MODE=true.
Fetches layout + session server-side. NextAuth routes under api/auth/*.

repo-conventions.convention: pnpm only. engines.node >= 22. Workspaces use workspace:*.
Don't edit dist/. Source is src/.
Don't import across package internals (no @igrp/framework-next-auth/dist/...). Use documented entry points.
Changeset per user-visible change to a publishable package.
.env.npmrc.example documents the registry setup; pnpm install:deps injects .env creds via dotenv-cli.
Framework packages: ESLint + Prettier. templates/demo: Biome. Don't run one on the other's tree.
